zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie於1398年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾洛賀布盧姆時，他的父親Murdoch Mackenzie 5th Laird of Kintail35歲，母親Finguala MacLeod of Harris24歲。他於大約1454年與Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail在蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1488年9月2日在蘇格蘭洛-爾享年90歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾波奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie于1398年出生在苏格兰洛-爾洛賀布盧姆时，他的父亲Murdoch Mackenzie 5th Laird of Kintail35岁，母亲Finguala MacLeod of Harris24岁。他于大约1454年与Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail在苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1488年9月2日在苏格兰洛-爾享年90岁，埋葬在苏格兰音巴內-爾波奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Mackenzie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kinsey
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Kynsey (Old English Cynesige from cyne- ‘royal’ + sige ‘victory’).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Swiss German Künzi (see Kuenzi ).

History: The paternal grandfather of NJ and PA legislator John Kinsey (1693–1750) was one of the commissioners sent out from England in 1677 by the West Jersey proprietors to buy land from the Indians and to lay out a town. John was the leader of the Quaker party in the PA assembly and chief justice of the PA supreme court.

variants.name: McKenzie
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinnich, a patronymic from the personal name Coinneach meaning ‘comely’, Anglicized as Kenneth. Compare the Irish form McKinney 2. The Scottish spelling with -z- indicates palatalization of the -n- (compare Menzies ).

History: This is the name of a Scottish Highland clan, historically associated with the mountainous district of Kintail in nortwestern Scotland, with Cromarty, and with Loch Seaforth (Loch Shiphoirt) on the Island of Harris.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie was born in 1398, in Lochbroom, Ross-shire, Scotland, his father, Murdoch Mackenzie 5th Laird of Kintail, was 35 and his mother, Finguala MacLeod of Harris, was 24. He married Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail about 1454, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 2 September 1488, in Ross-shire, Scotland, at the age of 90, and was buried in Beauly, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie est né en 1398, à Lochbroom, Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, Murdoch Mackenzie 5th Laird of Kintail, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Finguala MacLeod of Harris, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail environ 1454, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 2 septembre 1488, à Ross-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterré à Beauly, Inverness-shire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie 1398 in Lochbroom, Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Murdoch Mackenzie 5th Laird of Kintail 35 und seine Mutter Finguala MacLeod of Harris 24. Er hat um 1454 in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 2. September 1488 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Ross-shire, Scotland und wurde in Beauly, Inverness-shire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie è nato il nel 1398 nel Lochbroom, Ross-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Murdoch Mackenzie 5th Laird of Kintail, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Finguala MacLeod of Harris, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail circa 1454, nel Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 2 settembre 1488, nel Ross-shire, Scotland, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolto a Beauly, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzieが1398年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアロチブルームで生まれた時，父Murdoch Mackenzie 5th Laird of Kintailは35歳，母Finguala MacLeod of Harrisは24歳であった。約1454年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルでAnna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintailと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1488年9月2日にスコットランドロス-シュアイアで90歳で死去し，スコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアビーウリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie(이)가 1398년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 럭브룸에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Murdoch Mackenzie 5th Laird of Kintail(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Finguala MacLeod of Harris(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1454년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1488년 9월 2일 스컷랜드 로스-실르에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 보리에 묻혔다.

mn.Lochbroom, Ross-shire, Scotland, United: Lochbroom, Siorrachd Rois, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie nasceu em 1398, em Lochbroom, Ross-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Murdoch Mackenzie 5th Laird of Kintail, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Finguala MacLeod of Harris, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail aproximadamente 1454, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 2 de setembro de 1488, em Ross-shire, Scotland, com 90 anos, e foi sepultado em Beauly, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie родился в 1398 г. в местности лочбрум, росс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Murdoch Mackenzie 5th Laird of Kintail было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Finguala MacLeod of Harris, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail около 1454 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 2 сентября 1488 г. в местности росс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности болы, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie nació en 1398, en Lochbroom, Ross-shire, Scotland, su papá, Murdoch Mackenzie 5th Laird of Kintail, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Finguala MacLeod of Harris, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail aproximadamente 1454, en Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 2 de septiembre de 1488, en Ross-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultado en Beauly, Inverness-shire, Scotland.
